name: Irish Lamb Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or slow-cooking pot with browning function, brown the lamb in shortening.
2. Combine the browned meat in the slow-cooking pot with the remaining ingredients, except peas and flour. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours, or until the meat and potatoes are tender.
3. Add the peas; then mix the flour with half a cup of cold water to form a slurry. Stir into the stew.
4. Turn the heat to high. Cover and cook on high for an additional 15-20 minutes.
5. Serve and enjoy your Irish Lamb Stew, which makes 5-6 servings.
